what_it_does: Open-source toolchain for creating and exporting configurable human 3D characters.
succinct_summary: Strong baseline for generating a riggable Morgan body mesh when pure portrait generation is not enough.
possible_use: Create base human body assets, proportions, clothing placeholders, or export targets for Blender/rigging tests.
important_notes: Desktop/asset-authoring oriented; check export formats, rig quality, and license constraints for generated assets. README hint: MakeHuman
